metadata.title: Mithril Snapshot UX - Polish & Testing Tasks
metadata.description: Theming, accessibility, Storybook stories, E2E tests, and final verification for Mithril snapshot UX and the standalone chain-storage picker

phases.name: Theming & Styling
phases.description: Migrate Mithril and standalone chain-storage UI colors to CSS theme variables, then sync the runtime Daedalus theme outputs. Follow theme-management skill.

tasks.title: Migrate SCSS to theme variables
tasks.description: Replace hardcoded Mithril bootstrap and standalone chain-storage picker colors with semantic --theme-mithril-* and --theme-chain-storage-* CSS custom properties.

tasks.title: Add theme variables to createTheme
tasks.description: Add `mithrilBootstrap` and `chainStorage` theme sections to `createTheme.ts` with light and dark values. Runtime Daedalus `.ts` theme outputs remain the authoritative frontend assets.

tasks.title: Run theme validation and update
tasks.description: Run `yarn themes:check:createTheme` and `yarn themes:update`, then ensure the checked-in Daedalus runtime `.ts` theme files include the `mithrilBootstrap` and `chainStorage` tokens used by the app.

tasks.title: Regenerate SCSS type definitions
tasks.description: Run `yarn typedef:sass` to regenerate `.scss.d.ts` files for the Mithril bootstrap and standalone chain-storage stylesheets.

phases.name: Accessibility & Storybook
phases.description: Add a11y attributes and Storybook coverage for Mithril bootstrap and the standalone chain-storage picker. Follow storybook-creation skill.

tasks.title: Add accessibility attributes
tasks.description: Add role='progressbar' with aria-valuenow/min/max, aria-live on step indicator, aria-label on Mithril and standalone chain-storage interactive elements, and keyboard navigation where needed.

tasks.title: Storybook stories - Decision and Storage
tasks.description: Stories for: Decision (loading, with snapshots, selected snapshot), Storage (standalone chain-storage picker default path, custom path, validation error, migrating). Follow storybook-creation skill.

tasks.title: Storybook stories - Progress and Error
tasks.description: Stories for: Progress (preparing, downloading early/mid, downloading late-verifying copy, finalizing with local telemetry), Error (download, verify, convert, node-start). Follow storybook-creation skill.

tasks.title: Register stories in barrel file
tasks.description: Add loading/ domain directory and import to storybook/stories/index.ts

tasks.title: Extract Mithril story fixtures and harness
tasks.description: Move Mithril/loading Storybook fixture data and callback factories into shared support files, and add a minimal local harness for stateful snapshot-selection and chain-storage interactions.

tasks.title: Split Mithril stories by view
tasks.description: Subdivide the former monolithic Mithril Storybook file into focused decision, chain-storage, progress, and error story files, with chain storage moved into its own loading subfolder and one integrated MithrilBootstrap shell story retained for smoke coverage.

tasks.title: Add knobs-driven Mithril coverage
tasks.description: Add Storybook knobs for Mithril/loading state presets across snapshot decision, chain storage, progress, and error stories so reviewers can explore configurable flows without editing source fixtures.

phases.name: E2E Tests
phases.description: Cucumber BDD tests for the Mithril bootstrap flow and standalone chain-storage picker using the repo's backend-integrated app-flow pattern. Follow e2e-test-creation skill.

tasks.title: Create E2E feature file
tasks.description: Gherkin scenarios with @e2e tag covering decision screen (accept/decline bootstrap), progress stage advancement and cancel, error stage-specific messaging, and the standalone chain-storage picker flows (change, reset, insufficient space, disabled during sync). Exercise the real app/bootstrap flow using the repo's existing backend-integrated E2E pattern rather than direct Mithril store-state seeding.

tasks.title: Write E2E step definitions
tasks.description: Step definitions with SELECTORS const for CSS classes, async functions, Chai assertions, and repo-style E2E helpers/browser-context execution where needed for setup or assertions. Cover both Mithril flow assertions and standalone chain-storage picker interactions without direct Mithril store-state forcing for the primary flow. Follow e2e-test-creation skill.

phases.name: Verification
phases.description: Run all checks and verify correctness

tasks.title: Run verification suite
tasks.description: Run: yarn compile, yarn lint, yarn prettier:check, yarn themes:check:createTheme, yarn i18n:manage, yarn test:jest, yarn storybook, yarn typedef:sass; include standalone chain-storage picker and runtime theme output coverage in the review.
